A/B TESTING POP-UPS
Topic Progress:
In this lesson we'll talk about pop-ups and how to leverage them for conversions. The
smartest thing you can do with pop-ups is test different versions of them to see what
features convert most. To give you an example, we changed the copy at the bottom of
our pop-ups to read "No thanks, I'd rather pay full price." That alone resulted in a 1%
change in conversions. I'll discuss this in further detail and walk you through the most
important layout factors in this lesson.
Pop-Up A/B Tests
Call-to-action
Email box
Subscribe button
How the pop-up closes
Page background behind the pop-up
Branding
Copy/tone
Disclaimers and warnings
Different versions for desktop and mobile
Different versions for different countries
ACTION ITEM
If you're not already using a pop-up, try one.
If you're using a pop-up increase your conversion rate by testing the variables
discussed in this lesson.
TOOLS & RESOURCES
